nl_query: Count moderation applications that increased marks versus decreased marks.
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_moderation_applications
FROM   moderation_application ma
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.script_id = ma.script_id
WHERE  (ma.adjusted_total - ma.original_total) > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_moderation_applications
FROM   moderation_application ma
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.script_id = ma.script_id
WHERE  (ma.adjusted_total - ma.original_total) < 0;
error: Validation failed (safety): Non-SELECT statement detected by AST: Union. Only SELECT queries are permitted.
